title: AI Writing Tool ROI Calculator
description: Estimate whether an AI writing tool saves more money than it costs for your monthly content workflow.
metaDescription: Estimate monthly savings and break-even for AI writing tools using your own team data.

faq.q: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.a: It is a planning tool based on your inputs. Use conservative, base, and aggressive scenarios before deciding.

faq.q: Should I use annual pricing in this model?
faq.a: Start with monthly cost assumptions first, then compare annual plans after validating usage.
